source: brickslaw.com (JSON-LD Organization/LocalBusiness logo field, confirmed via website-content-crawler)

items.description: Primary horizontal wordmark, black on transparent/white, 'PETER BRICKS, P.C. / Personal Injury & Bankruptcy Attorney'
Full lockup: square 'P|B' mark plus 'PETER BRICKS, P.C.' wordmark and tagline, black on white
items.use: Social share image / alternate lockup; can be cropped to isolate the square 'P|B' mark for favicon use

notes: Both logo assets are black-on-white PNGs sourced directly from the live Wix site. No SVG source was found; recommend vectorizing the wordmark if the build needs a crisp SVG. No separate icon-only mark file exists yet, crop the square 'P|B' block from bricks-law-logo-lockup.png if a standalone icon mark is needed.
